creator: admin@aknet.ru
text:
Machine is a ProLiant DL-385. It acts as a network router. There are a dualport gigabit ethernet em-based controller at PCI-X 133 slot.
Both ports are connected to a ProCurve 3400 switch and each of them holds about 60 VLANS. Machine routes about 200kpps.
Panic happened when I tried to enable polling: ifconfig em0 polling

# cat /var/run/dmesg.boot
